---
title: "About"
description: |
  A bit more about me and this site.
output:
  distill::distill_article:
    toc: true
---

## About This Site

The site is hosted on GitHub Pages and serves as a portfolio for my academic work in GV300.

## About Me

I am a final year university student studying political science with a focus on quantitative methods. My coursework in GV300 has involved working with data in R, producing statistical analyses, and creating visualisations to communicate findings clearly.

## Tools and Technologies

- **R and RStudio** for data analysis and visualisation
- **ggplot2** for creating publication-quality figures
- **Git and GitHub** for version control and hosting

## Contact

You can find my work on [GitHub](https://github.com/bandarj300).
